# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: projects/my_project_id # Required by Cloud Deployment Manager API v1, set your project ID here (required)
    type: deploymentmanager.googleapis.com/Project
  
  - name: mybucket         # Name for the bucket where you'll host static website assets in GCS         
    type: cloudstorage.googleapis.com/Bucket     
    properties:          
        storageClass: STANDARD     # Required by Cloud Deployment Manager API v1, set as PERFORMANCE here (required)        
  
  - name: mybucketaccess      
    type: deploymentmanager.googleapis.com/Operation
    properties:         
      service: `deploymentmanager.googleapis.com#operation:projects/{projectId}/operations/{localOperationName}` # Required by Cloud Deployment Manager API v1 (required)          
        operationType: ACCEPT_ALL     # REQUIRED BY CLOUD DEPLOYMENT MANAGER AND WILL NOT BE SPECIFIED IN YAML IF AVAILABLE         
      permissions:        
       - role: roles/storage.objectViewer    # Role for the bucket viewers to access your Bucket (required) 
           type: 'user'   # REQUIRED BY CLOUD DEPLOYMENT MANAGER AND WILL NOT BE SPECIFIED IN YAML IF AVAILABLE
